summary: Made surgical continuity edits to clarify the chapter's placement after chapter 5 and to better set up chapter 7's references to Tallow's hint and the lingering ring in Owen's palm.
edits: Clarified the opening time cue so the supper scene lands as the next evening after Owen and Prue's manuscript session.
Sharpened Tallow's refusal into a specific hint about something lying below the kitchens, matching chapter 7's later recall.
Added a light palm-ringing beat in the final paragraph to bridge into chapter 7's sleepless aftermath.
